title: The 9 million barrel question
summary:
Main
Image reference: $1.jpg | assets/2024-02-28_the-9-million-barrel-question_img_241_7054288bd4a6.jpg
Whilst there is significant debate as to the strength of long-term oil demand growth, there is little debate as to where much of that growth will come from; India. The world's most populous country sits far behind China in terms of its oil demand per capita, underscoring how much potential remains. Indeed, the country is set to be the largest single source of demand growth between now and 2030.
